economic_notes: First Nation operates consolidated business enterprises including St. Theresa Point Bulk Fuels Ltd., STP Management Group Ltd., Mikahnow Construction Ltd., St. Theresa Point Road Construction Corporation, First Nation Insurance Services Inc., and two numbered Manitoba companies. Gas and fuel sales of $3,189,736. Retail store merchandise for sale to members.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 not 2024. Audit report signed May 9, 2022 - significantly late (over 2 years after year-end). 7 consolidated subsidiaries. Net debt position of $45,294,303. Long-term debt includes FNFA loans ($20,891,646), CMHC housing mortgages ($14,353,930), and other debt ($2,040,144). CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $720,593. Contaminated sites identified but no liability recorded. Manitoba Keewatinowi Okimakanak revenue of $954,757 in prior year but $0 in current year. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $51,481,792 + CMHC $1,174,315 + Province of Manitoba $1,027,810 + Island Lake Tribal Council $1,333,739 + Assembly of Manitoba Chiefs Secretariat Inc. $830,032 = $55,847,688. OSR = $63,712,768 - $55,847,688 = $7,865,080 (includes other revenue and deferred revenue movements). annual_debt_service = FNFA repayments $503,268 + CMHC repayments $835,906 + other debt repayments $426,696 = $1,765,870.
